title: Capesize Market Falling Due In Part To Drop in Brazilian Spot Iron Ore Cargo Volume
section_path: Capesize Market Falling Due In Part To Drop in Brazilian Spot Iron Ore Cargo Volume
section_path_text: Capesize Market Falling Due In Part To Drop in Brazilian Spot Iron Ore Cargo Volume
summary:
Main
By Jeffrey Landsberg
As we discussed in Commodore Research's June 23rd Weekly Executive Report, overall dry bulk rates fell last week with capesize rates in particular coming under significant pressure. Brazilian spot iron ore cargo volume climbed even further last week, which helped propel capesize rates even higher during the first half the week. Last week's 9 officially announced Brazilian spot iron ore cargoes again marked the largest amount reported all year.
